news_data.title: Apple Reports Record Q4 Revenue of $89.5B
news_data.snippet: Apple exceeded analyst expectations with strong iPhone 15 Pro demand driving record quarterly revenue.

news_data.title: Apple Services Revenue Hits All-Time High
news_data.snippet: Services segment grew 16% YoY to $22.3B, led by App Store, Apple Music, and iCloud subscriptions.

news_data.title: Apple Intelligence Rollout Boosts iPhone Upgrade Cycle
news_data.snippet: On-device AI features are accelerating upgrade rates, with analysts projecting a multi-year supercycle.

news_data.title: Apple Expands India Manufacturing to Reduce China Dependency
news_data.snippet: Foxconn and Tata Electronics ramp up iPhone production in India, now accounting for 14% of global output.

news_data.title: Apple Announces $110B Share Buyback Program
news_data.snippet: The largest buyback in corporate history signals management confidence in long-term cash flow generation.

social_data.title: AAPL Bull Case Strengthens
social_data.snippet: Apple's ecosystem moat keeps widening. Services margins above 70% make this a cash machine. $250 PT.

social_data.title: iPhone 16 Pro Max Review
social_data.snippet: Best smartphone camera I've ever used. Apple Intelligence summarization is genuinely useful daily.

social_data.title: Apple Ecosystem Lock-in Discussion
social_data.snippet: Switched my whole family to Apple. AirDrop, iMessage, and Handoff make everything seamless.

review_data.title: Apple Inc. Employee Review — Software Engineer
review_data.snippet: Great work-life balance, excellent compensation, and meaningful projects. Bureaucracy can slow innovation.

review_data.title: Apple Inc. Employee Review — Retail
review_data.snippet: Good benefits for retail. High expectations and busy stores but strong team culture.
